leadText: The Light Ball (Japanese: でんきだま Electric Orb) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It boosts the stats of a Pikachu that holds it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.2 Generations II and III 1.3 Generation IV 1.4 Generation V onward 1.5 Outside of battle 1.5.1 Pokémon Emerald onward Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Pikachu , it doubles its Special Attack . Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Pikachu , it doubles the power of its moves . Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Pikachu , it doubles both its Attack and Special Attack . It is compatible with Cosplay Pikachu , Pikachu in a cap , and Gigantamax Pikachu. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Emerald onward [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a Pichu when the Egg is produced, the Pichu that hatches will know the move Volt Tackle . From Generation VI onward, if a Pichu knows Volt Tackle this way (and was bred in Generation VI onward), it can be taught Volt Tackle again at the Move Reminder if it forgets the move.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C An odd, electrical orb. (HOLD) R S E Colo XD A hold item that raises the Sp. Atk of Pikachu . FR LG An orb to be held by a Pikachu that raises the Sp. Atk stat. Touching it may cause a shock. D P An item to be held by Pikachu . It is a puzzling orb that raises the Sp. Atk stat. Pt HG SS An item to be held by Pikachu . It is a puzzling orb that raises the Attack and Sp. Atk stat. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by Pikachu. It is a puzzling orb that raises the Attack and Sp. Atk stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by Pikachu. It's a puzzling orb that boosts its Attack and Sp. Atk stats. S V An item to be held by Pikachu. It's a mysterious orb that boosts Pikachu’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats.
